description: Crafted from soft cotton/lycra fabric, this high coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with a shaper panel for additional body contouring. The moulded style has double layered cups to prevent show through and ensures a smooth look with a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for daily wear. Made of breathable stretch cotton/lycra fabric for enhanced comfort Shaper panel with double layered cups for perfect smoothness, shaping and style Beautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretch Printed label for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Hand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or iron Drip dry in shade Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
